message:
fix(event_coalescer): preserve scroll position and fix documentation

- Add x, y fields to ScrollState to preserve scroll event position
- Update handle_scroll() to track position through coalescing
- Fix scroll_to_event() to use preserved position instead of (0, 0)
- Correct documentation: non-coalescable events pass through without auto-flush
- Rewrite mixed_coalescing_workflow test with correct flush-then-process logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
